Lightning Funded: Account Payout Policy
Dedicated payout policy for Lightning Funded accounts with immediate eligibility and scaling paths.

April 23, 2026

Table of contents

Traders receive 90% of the payout amount requested.

Traders can have a maximum of 5 total Simulated Funded Accounts with any combination of Growth, Select, and Lightning Funded account types.

Payout Guidelines

- Payout approvals require you to abide by the Tradeify Funded Trader Agreement.

- If you have more than one account, each account is treated independently. You may withdraw from each account according to the schedule below, provided you followed the rules for each account.

- Once you submit a payout request, it cannot be edited or canceled.

Payout Requirements

Your account must satisfy all of the below criteria for EACH payout request in order to qualify.

- Consistency Rule: Meet the 20% Consistency Rule (see: What is the Consistency Rule?)

- Lightning Funded Accounts must follow a 20% Consistency Rule for the first payout, then 25% for the second payout, and 30% for all subsequent payouts.

Important Note: The gradually increasing consistency requirements apply to Lightning Funded accounts purchased AFTER September 12, 2025 at 8:00 AM EST

- Existing accounts maintain their current consistency rules (20% for all payouts).

- Minimum Days Traded: No Minimum Trading Day Count. You can request a payout after any number of trading days, as long as you meet the Profit Goal and Consistency Rule.

- Payout Profit Goals: Payout Profit Goals are the profit you need to earn in between payout requests. After each payout, your profit goal resets and you must earn fresh profit from new trades to reach the next goal. Leftover profit from the previous cycle does not carry over.

Payout Profit Goal Table for Accounts purchased after September 12, 2025 at 8:00 AM EST:

Account Size

Payout 1 Profit Goal

Payout 2+ Profit Goal

Important Notes

- You will still be able to place trades after submitting a payout request. However, be aware that if you fail your account or fall below the minimum thresholds for a payout before the request is processed, your payout will be denied.

- Payout Profit Goals reset after each payout and to achieve the next payout you move on to the next Payout Profit Goal.

- e.g. for a $150k account when you reach Payout 1 Profit Goal of $9k you can take a payout. You now must achieve Payout 2 Profit Goal of $4.5k to take your next payout. (see Payout Profit Goal Table)

- Example: You have a $150k Lightning account (post-Sep 12) and just received your first payout. Your balance is now $159k but your profit goal resets — you need $4,500 in new profit from new trades. Your consistency also resets, now at 25% for Payout 2. This means your highest single profitable day cannot exceed $1,125 ($4,500 × 25%). A safe approach is ~$1,125/day across 4 trading days.

- Profit is calculated and determined upon account reconciliation, which happens daily between approximately 6:00 P.M. and 8:00 P.M. EST.

Payout Procedure

- Payout requests can be submitted directly from your dashboard once payout conditions have been met.

- Once your payout status is changed to APPROVED, your funds are immediately withdrawn from your account. Payments will be issued within 24 hours after the withdrawal has been processed.

- Payout requests submitted outside of normal business hours (Mon-Fri, 8:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. EST and all Federal holidays) may take up to 72 hours to process.

Lightning Funded traders can now instantly request payouts directly from the dashboard once the consistency rule and profit objective are met.

Payout Tiers

- The minimum payout amount is $1,000.

- The maximum payout is dependent on the account size and approved payout request number.

See this table:

- Payouts after the 4th remain capped at the same level as the 4th.

$25K Account Note: For $25K Lightning accounts, the payout amount is fixed at $1,000 for all payouts (the minimum and maximum are both $1,000).

Note: Tradeify reserves the right to move you to a Live Funded Account at any time after a successful payout. Tradeify will contact you via email regarding this decision.

For full details on transitioning to Elite Live, see Tradeify Elite Program.
